allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) builders = data.get\('x', []\) for b in builders[5:]: print\(f'--- {b[\\"name\\"]} \(@{b[\\"handle\\"]}\) ---'\) print\(f'Bio: {b.get\(\\"bio\\",\\"\\"\)}'\) tweets = b.get\('tweets', []\) for t in tweets[:3]: print\(f' Tweet: {t.get\(\\"text\\",\\"\\"\)[:300]}'\) print\(f' URL: {t.get\(\\"url\\",\\"\\"\)}'\) ")
